text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — 66 PRs merged. We overhauled audio, swapped out video engines, and added API key management.

───

→ AUDIO & VIDEO
The media engines got a V8 swap. Added ACE-Step 1.5 for music and upgraded to openai-audio-large. Whisper now supports word-level timestamps and speaker diarization. We also added media caching, because regenerating the exact same audio clip is a waste of electricity.

→ MODELS & SDK
Wan 2.7 and Klein 4B are live. Fixed an issue where Wan models stubbornly ignored width and height parameters. The SDK got a major update with dedicated TTS/music endpoints and image editing support.

→ KEYS & BOTS
You can finally create, list, and revoke API keys via the new endpoints. We also launched a family of Discord bots, including CatGPT (with vision) and an Opposite Prompt bot that we immediately had to patch with NSFW safety instructions. Because the internet is the internet.

→ COMMUNITY
25 new community apps added this week, from 3D icon generators to RPG engines.

───

Everything is open source. No subscriptions.
github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #WebDev
